git_state.deleted_directory: packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/ (entire CLI cmd directory removed, 130+ files)

details.description: install-cli.ts does not exist in packages/desktop/src/main/ or anywhere in the package. No git history exists for this file - it has never been committed. The ElectronAPI type and preload bridge both reference installCli() as a method, and ipc.ts:51 registers the handler, but the implementation file is missing.
details.root_cause: install-cli.ts was never created. The import, handler, type definition, and preload bridge were all wired but the implementation module is missing.
details.fix: Create install-cli.ts exporting a function installCli(): Promise<string>, or remove all references to installCli across ipc.ts, preload/types.ts, and preload/index.ts if the feature is deferred.

areas.name: MCP dependency chain - TuiEvent module deleted

details.description: The entire packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/ directory has been deleted (git shows D for all 130+ files). The @tui/* tsconfig alias is now a dead path. TuiEvent is used by the MCP service for bus publish calls (toast show, browser open events) and HTTP API TUI handlers. The tsconfig still has @/* alias mapping to ./src/* but ./src/cli/cmd/tui/event.ts no longer exists.
details.root_cause: TUI module directory was deleted as part of a migration, but 3 source files still import from the old TuiEvent path. DuckDB test also fails transitively.
details.fix: Re-create TuiEvent module at the expected path, update imports to point to new location, or refactor MCP to use BusEvent types instead of TuiEvent.

areas.name: App config state - missing settings properties

errors: TS2339: Property 'setOnboarded' does not exist on settings.general type
TS2339: Property 'showSessionViz' does not exist on settings.general type
TS2339: Property 'setShowSessionViz' does not exist on settings.general type
details.description: Settings interface (settings.tsx:21-37) defines general with 13 boolean settings. The provider creates a general object with exactly 13 property+setter pairs. Neither include showSessionViz, setShowSessionViz, or setOnboarded. These 4 new untracked files depend on settings properties not yet added.
details.root_cause: Session-viz feature files were added (untracked) but Settings interface and provider were not extended with the new properties.
details.fix: Add showSessionViz and onboarded to Settings.general interface, defaults, and withFallback+setter entries in the provider.

patterns.detail: Tool execute functions return Effect<..., never, Service | ...> but DefWithoutID constrains required services to never
Schema.String.annotations({...}) does not exist in current Effect Schema version. Correct: annotate()
record-stress-wave and record-execution-wave missing init in registry Info type
Uses generator directly instead of Effect.fn; readDirectory/stat missing on Service

findings: No yield* needed because Fence.load() is not an Effect
Minor implicit any: 'Parameter row' at fence.ts:22

details.root_cause: Same as Area 2 - test transitively imports mcp/index.ts which imports deleted module
details.fix: Resolve Area 2 (TuiEvent import) to unblock this test

smoking_guns.summary: install-cli.ts never existed - desktop IPC handler imports a ghost module
smoking_guns.evidence: No install-cli.ts in git history or filesystem. Preload and types are wired but implementation is missing.

smoking_guns.summary: Entire TUI module directory deleted, breaking MCP + HTTP API TUI handlers + DuckDB test
smoking_guns.evidence: 130+ files deleted. 3 source files + 1 test file import the missing @/cli/cmd/tui/event. tsconfig @tui/* alias is dead.

smoking_guns.summary: Session-viz feature files reference settings properties that don't exist
smoking_guns.evidence: 4 new files access showSessionViz, setShowSessionViz, setOnboarded but Settings interface lacks them all.

smoking_guns.summary: 15 tool files have DefWithoutID service channel mismatch
smoking_guns.evidence: DefWithoutID constrains services to never but tool execute functions return Effect with Service requirements.

smoking_guns.summary: Schema.String.annotations() used in 6 tool files where .annotate() is correct (pre-existing bug)
smoking_guns.evidence: Pre-existing finding ses_18a4-20260529-debt confirms this. 6 files still affected.

pre_existing_findings.summary: Schema.String.annotations is not a function blocking duckdb-query.test.ts
